title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: locally run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other LLMs via a simple CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-community/llms/ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you swap in Ollama models for chains, agents, RAG, and tool use.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI); markdown, code highlighting, multi-user, RAG.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich terminal UI (Rust) for interactive chatting, model management, and conversation history.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-hub
summary: Community-driven registry of custom Modelfiles, adapters, and example prompts for Ollama.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal FastAPI template for retrieval-augmented generation using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama; Kotlin & Scala friendly, Spring Boot starters included.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with async enumerable streaming and DI integration.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and horizontal pod autoscaling.

title: ollama-dl
summary: Lightweight Go CLI to pre-download Ollama model blobs for offline/air-gapped environments.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform desktop app (Tauri + React) for chatting with Ollama models offline.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor, and explain code using any Ollama model without leaving the editor.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Community mono-repo hosting unofficial SDKs for Ruby, PHP, Dart, and Swift generated from OpenAPI specs.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models to servers with slash commands and thread-based chats.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin for local AI summarization, brainstorming, and Q&A on your vault using Ollama.

title: ollama-gradle-plugin
summary: Gradle plugin to download and serve Ollama models during JVM integration tests or build tasks.

title: ollama-swift
summary: Swift Package Manager client for Ollama with async/await and Combine publishers for macOS/iOS apps.
